name: Siriusware Ski Resort Point-of-Sale API
what_it_does: Siriusware REST API for ski resort and outdoor recreation point-of-sale and ticketing platform. Enables AI agents to manage ticket and pass sales, retrieve product and pricing data, access guest profiles and pass history, handle rental transactions, manage season pass validation, integrate with lift access control systems, and connect resort sales data with loyalty and marketing systems.
use_cases: Retrieving ticket product availability and pricing from resort booking agents
Managing season pass sales and validation from resort access agents
Accessing guest profiles and purchase history from resort CRM agents
Integrating ticket sales data with resort loyalty programs from marketing agents
not_for: Non-outdoor recreation without lift ticket and pass management
Hotel lodging without outdoor activity ticketing integration
Theme parks using different ticketing systems without ski resort workflows
best_when: A ski resort or outdoor recreation venue using Siriusware wants AI agents to automate ticket sales, season pass management, rental transactions, and guest data integration with marketing systems.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Ticket and pass pricing errors directly impact revenue. Lift access control integration has physical safety implications — validate all automated gate and access changes.

auth.notes: Siriusware uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Resort-level credentials. Part of accesso Technology Group. Partner program for integration developers. Separate credentials for Siriusware vs accesso products.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — ski resort enterprise POS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-installation enterprise pricing; part of accesso Technology Group bundle
pricing.notes: Acquired by accesso Technology Group. Largest ski resort ticketing system in North America. 450+ ski resorts and outdoor venues. Tightly integrated with RFID lift access control systems.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in partner portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Lift ticket pricing and access control has direct safety and revenue implications
No public MCP server — REST API with partner program required
No webhooks — requires polling for transaction data
Part of accesso group — multiple product lines with separate APIs
Lift access control integration is safety-critical — validate all automated gate changes
US/CA data residency — common for North American ski operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest payment and access control data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US/CA data residency. Lift access control is safety-critical system.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest payment and lift access data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US/CA data residency. Safety-critical lift access integration.
